en: A SONG OF ASCENTS. OF DAVID. If it had not been the LORD who was on our side- let Israel now say-
zh: 願以色列人說： 如果不是耶和華幫助我們，

en: if it had not been the LORD who was on our side when people rose up against us,
zh: 如果不是耶和華幫助我們； 那麼，人起來攻擊我們，

en: then they would have swallowed us up alive, when their anger was kindled against us;
zh: 向我們發怒的時候， 就把我們活活吞下去了。

en: then the flood would have swept us away, the torrent would have gone over us;
zh: 那時，洪水漫過我們， 急流淹沒我們；

en: then over us would have gone the raging waters.
zh: 洶湧的洪水把我們淹沒。

en: Blessed be the LORD, who has not given us as prey to their teeth!
zh: 耶和華是應當稱頌的， 他沒有容讓敵人把我們當作獵物撕裂。

en: We have escaped like a bird from the snare of the fowlers; the snare is broken, and we have escaped!
zh: 我們像雀鳥從捕鳥的人的網羅裡逃脫； 網羅破裂，我們就逃脫了。

en: Our help is in the name of the LORD, who made heaven and earth.
zh: 我們的幫助在於耶和華的名， 他是造天地的主。
